header.label: Pricing
header.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
header.subtitle: No hidden fees. No surprises. Just great visuals delivered fast.

realEstate.title: Real Estate Marketing
realEstate.label: How it works
realEstate.description: Real estate pricing is tailored to the property — factoring in square footage, location, and the services you need. Enter your listing address in our portal and get an instant, accurate quote in seconds.
realEstate.ctaSub: Get an instant quote based on your property.

socialMedia.label: Custom packages
socialMedia.description: Social media content is built around your brand, platform, and goals — no two strategies are the same. Whether you need a monthly content package, a one-time campaign, or ongoing short-form video production, we'll scope a plan that fits your business.
socialMedia.ctaSub: Tell us about your brand and we'll put together a custom quote.

otherServices.title: Other Services
otherServices.subtitle: Every project is unique. Prices below are starting points — contact us for a custom quote.

cards.name: Branding
cards.description: Headshots & portraits from $250. Social media reels from $450. Documentary bio films from $3,995.

cards.name: Premium Wedding
cards.description: Photo & video packages from 5–10 hours. Combo packages (photo + video) from $6,600 — save up to $1,400.
